title: lagerstroemia parviflora var. parviflora
intro: Lagerstroemia parviflora var. parviflora, also known as the narrow-leaved crape myrtle or crape myrtle, is a plant species that belongs to the Lythraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia parviflora var. parviflora include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate gastrointestinal issues, and provide antioxidant and antibacterial effects. The herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments.
